description: A migration adds a NOT NULL column with DEFAULT to a large table and creates a non-concurrent index. Both operations acquire exclusive locks that block writes. The migration passes in CI against an empty test database but will lock production for minutes.
note: The app code in src/user_service.py actively queries the users table. The index creation without CONCURRENTLY will lock writes. The ADD COLUMN with NOT NULL DEFAULT rewrites the table in older Postgres.
